title: agrostis × hegetschweileri
intro: Agrostis × hegetschweileri is a rare hybrid grass species, resulting from the cross between Agrostis canina and Agrostis stolonifera. The medicinal properties of Agrostis × hegetschweileri are not well-documented, however, it has been traditionally used for its potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with this plant are still being researched, but some claim it may help soothe skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Agrostis × hegetschweileri are not commonly found, but it is sometimes used in traditional medicine as a topical application for minor skin issues.
